title: DOORS Mod
description: This is a mod that adds many creatures from DOORS！
body:
This is a mod that adds many mobs from DOORS. So far, it has added:Grumble,Seek,Gloombat,giggle,Groundskeeper,Figure,Eyestalk and Monument!
Warning:This mod Require Geckolib(for now).The mobs won't spawn naturally,the only way to see them is using the spawn eggs.



This mod comes with Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) translation
If you have any suggestions about traslation, please come to the Discord server to discuss!



The purpose of the mod is to provide players who want to play DOORS content in Minecraft with a best choice that will not destroy the vanilla style.









這是一個增加了眾多 DOORS 生物的模組。目前已新增：Grumble、Seek、Gloombat、giggle、Groundskeeper、Figure Eyestalk 和 Monument！警告：此模組目前需要 Geckolib。這些生物不會自然生成，唯一能看到牠們的方式是使用生怪蛋。
此模組旨在為想要在 Minecraft 中體驗 DOORS 內容的玩家提供一個最佳選擇，同時又不破壞原版風格。



本模組自帶 繁體中文(台灣) 翻譯
如有相關建議歡迎到Discord群組討論!
